sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84786" key="polu/doulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-δουλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having many slaves,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.80</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:171" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.171</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
